name: hsc-exam-portal
description: HSC Exam Portal - Backend API & Frontend Application

scripts.install-all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend run build && node ./scripts/prepare-frontend-output.mjs
scripts.build:frontend:hostinger: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend run build && node ./scripts/prepare-frontend-output.mjs
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.verify:predeploy: npm --prefix backend run test:flow && npm --prefix backend run verify:predeploy && npm --prefix frontend run build

author: HSC Team
